line_style: 无线条,真实抓拍,高ISO颗粒感
render: 数码抓拍+新闻后期,documentary grain
lighting: 现场光+闪光灯,高对比硬光,自然光
prompt_keywords: Documentary photography, photojournalism style, candid moment, high ISO grain, natural lighting, real emotion, news scene authenticity, unposed capture
negative_keywords: studio lighting, posed, retouched, cartoon, anime, fantasy, sci-fi, fashion, glamour

fp_examples.action: 记者举起相机,闪光灯亮起,记录发言人讲话
记者在街头采访目击者,周围人群围观
记者在抗议人群中抓拍,标语挥舞,情绪激烈
记者在编辑部整理照片,屏幕光映在脸上

prompt_example: A photojournalist raises their camera in a crowded press conference, flash illuminating the speaker, high ISO grain, candid documentary moment, natural lighting, real emotion, news scene authenticity --ar 2:3 --s 750 --style raw --no text
style_constraint_cn:
【风格强制约束】当前风格: 纪实摄影·新闻质感
✅ 允许场景: 新闻现场/街头/工厂/医院 (从故事原文提取)
❌ 禁止场景: 影棚摆拍/时尚秀场/奇幻/科幻
❌ 禁止照抄: 不要用'古宅雨夜',必须用真实纪实场景
氛围: 真实中灰,新闻质感
style_constraint_en: IMPORTANT: Extract scenes from the story content. Use realistic documentary scenes (press conferences, streets, factories). Do NOT use studio setups, fantasy, or 'ancient mansion'. Emphasize candid capture and high ISO grain.
meta_prompt: Documentary photography, photojournalism style, candid moment, high ISO grain, natural lighting, real emotion, news scene authenticity

cognitive_level.reader_profile: 大众读者·获取真实信息
cognitive_level.content_adaptation: 入门级纪实, 信息直白易懂

reader_constraint.reader_state: 信息获取者·期待真实记录
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 真实场景+自然光线+客观叙事

visual_frequency.HF: 主体人物/关键动作/信息文字(高频信息锚点)
visual_frequency.MF: 环境背景/道具细节/中景叙事(中频语境)
visual_frequency.LF: 天空/远景/虚化区(低频氛围)
visual_frequency.progression: HF主体居中信息密集, MF环境环绕提供语境, LF远景自然过渡
